extortion.description: wct.com.my zoominfo.com/c/wct-holdings-berhad/372152043 WCT Holdings Berhad is a prominent construction company in Malaysia with over 40 years of experience, specializing in a diverse range of engineering and construction services. The company also engages in property development, shopping malls, hospitality, and business aviation.
